description: Quality evals for 1Password SSH agent and Git signing workflows.

cases.title: macOS SSH agent setup
cases.prompt: Set up the 1Password SSH agent on macOS and configure my SSH client to use it for GitHub.

assertions.description: Response includes verification steps with ssh-add -l or equivalent
Response states private keys do not leave 1Password

cases.title: Git commit signing setup
cases.prompt: I need to sign Git commits with my 1Password SSH key and verify signatures on GitHub.

assertions.description: Response includes SSH signing git config values
Response includes provider registration as signing key

cases.title: Scope boundary to environments skill
cases.prompt: I want to mount local .env files from 1Password Environments and validate them with agent hooks.

assertions.description: Response avoids positioning SSH as primary for env mounts
